title: CRWV, OXY, ASTS, RKLB, RGTI, SONY, SE, NBIS, OKLO, CSCO, TDG, CRCL, DIS, AMAT, BN, NU, BABA, MUFG | Q3 2025 Earnings Preview: November 10-14, 2025
author: tickeron_community
selftext: As global markets navigate a complex landscape of AI infrastructure expansion, economic uncertainty, and shifting monetary policy, the week of November 10-14, 2025, marks a critical juncture for investor sentiment. With the U.S. government shutdown limiting official economic data and labor market softening raising concerns about growth, earnings from diverse sectors will provide essential clarity on corporate resilience and capital allocation strategies. These quarterly reports will offer crucial insights into how businesses are adapting to persistent geopolitical tensions, tariff uncertainties, and evolving consumer behavior while capitalizing on the extraordinary opportunities presented by artificial intelligence.
